behavior_summary: U8P_RHIAN implements the NPC Rhian: short U8P_RHIAN::look descriptions, a full conversation/shop handler, time-of-day U8P_RHIAN::schedule selection, fast-area (proximity) reactions, grief/idle monologues, and theft/attack reactions that can escalate to calling guards.
U8P_RHIAN::look() returns a context-sensitive short description string (death state, name/job metadata flags).

U8P_RHIAN::use() drives the conversation UI: builds and updates menus for shops (gems, clothing), invokes sub-flows (gem trade, clothing shop, U8P_RHIAN::schedule, monologues), manages rhianMet/ rhianKneeling/ rhianSitting flags and uses random buckets for flavor.

U8P_RHIAN::enterFastArea()/U8P_RHIAN::leaveFastArea() reset interaction references and route to immediate reaction helpers (U8P_RHIAN::func0631, U8P_RHIAN::func06DC, U8P_RHIAN::func0804, U8P_RHIAN::func0EC5) depending on U8P_RHIAN::schedule and grieving/sitting state.

U8P_RHIAN::AvatarStoleSomething(uword) inspects a stolen item, issues escalating warnings (rhianMoveCheck increments), may set stolenOnce and call CALGUARD::guardRespondToCrime if escalation reaches guard-calling, and spawns small timed helpers.
U8P_RHIAN::cast(uword) reacts to attacks: may spawn deferred helper tasks and call guardRespondToCrime when a target id matches an attack condition; also occasionally barks for help.

Several helper functions (U8P_RHIAN::func0631, U8P_RHIAN::func06DC, U8P_RHIAN::func0862, U8P_RHIAN::func0FFB, U8P_RHIAN::func1521, U8P_RHIAN::func1884, U8P_RHIAN::func1F3C) provide varied vocal lines, shop menus, gem valuation, and item-based context-sensitive reactions.
notable_control_flow: U8P_RHIAN::look(): immediate branching based on Npc::isDead(this) and two metadata flags (rhianName, rhianJob) to choose one short bark string.

U8P_RHIAN::use(): conversation entry gates on toranDead, rhianMet, rhianKneeling, rhianSitting and then runs a conversation loop built by MenuSet/MenuUnion/MenuRemove; dispatches to sub-flows (U8P_RHIAN::func1521, U8P_RHIAN::func1884, U8P_RHIAN::func1F3C, utilities) and sets rhianMet on first meeting.

U8P_RHIAN::enterFastArea(): early-exits if NPC is dead or on map 0x03; otherwise clears several stored refs and selects one of multiple immediate reaction helpers based on rhianKneeling, rhianSchedule and rhiangrieving flags.

U8P_RHIAN::AvatarStoleSomething(param): checks rhianSchedule and item type (Item::getType), updates rhianMoveCheck/stolenOnce and calls external guard routine when escalation threshold reached; spawns deferred tasks and triggers METHOD::func15E7 for animation sync.

U8P_RHIAN::schedule(): reads FREE::getTimeOfDayPeriod, sets bitmask/route locals per period, calls METHOD::func143A then on process_result() writes rhianSchedule and calls METHOD::func133F to apply U8P_RHIAN::schedule.
open_questions: Exact semantics and value-meaning of numeric constants used for item types (e.g., 0x0254, 0x0337) and U8P_RHIAN::schedule masks — what concrete in-game items or routes they map to.
Precise persistence scope of flags like rhianSchedule, rhianKneeling, rhiangrieving, rhianSitting and whether they are stored globally or per-save (inferred to be persistent script flags).
Behavior of METHOD::func15E7 and METHOD::func091C: inferred to be animation/gesture helpers but exact side-effects (face, timing, camera) are unknown.
The intended meaning of some reference slots (0x0205, 0x0204, 0x00F0, 0x0200) — they are reset regularly but their exact stored references (avatar/item/process) are not fully identified.

main_function.name: U8P_RHIAN::look
main_function.purpose: Return a short, context-sensitive description when the player examines Rhian; chooses between corpse text, named/job combined text, name-only, job-only, or a generic fallback.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player 'looks' at the NPC (examine/LOOK action).
Branches on Npc::isDead(this) and script metadata flags rhianName and rhianJob.

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::use
function_map.role: conversation and interaction handler; builds menus and dispatches to shop/monologue sub-flows

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: reaction to theft: inspect stolen item, warn/escalate, possibly call guards

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::schedule
function_map.role: time-of-day U8P_RHIAN::schedule selection and commit logic

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::cast
function_map.role: reaction to being targeted/attacked; spawn tasks and call guard response

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::enterFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area entry behavior: reset refs and invoke nearby reaction helpers

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::func0631
function_map.role: short crying/kneeling monologue and spawn timed follow-up

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::func06DC
function_map.role: short sob/sniff monologue with spawn follow-up

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::func0794
function_map.role: set grieving state and run repeated animation/gesture sequence

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::func0804
function_map.role: enter sitting state, call idle monologue U8P_RHIAN::func0862 and U8P_RHIAN::schedule a delayed helper

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::func0862
function_map.role: idle/varied monologue based on distance and random choice

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::func0EC5
function_map.role: inspect nearby item frames, possibly pathfind or call context monologue U8P_RHIAN::func0FFB

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::func0FFB
function_map.role: context-sensitive proximity barks using item coordinates and randomness

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::func1521
function_map.role: gem valuation and yes/no trade prompt (compute coin offer, handle acceptance)

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::func1884
function_map.role: gem shop menu flow (present options, branch on choice, confirm and attempt transaction)

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::func1F3C
function_map.role: clothing shop menu flow (present clothing options, prices, confirm and attempt transfer)

function_map.name: U8P_RHIAN::func4E14
function_map.role: orchestrate short reaction sequence (seated vs non-seated), spawn helper tasks and release avatar stasis

internal_calls.purpose: Invoke short kneeling/crying monologue when rhianKneeling flag is set
Invoke grieving monologue when U8P_RHIAN::schedule==0x01 and rhiangrieving is true
Invoke sitting/idling helper when U8P_RHIAN::schedule==0x01 and not grieving
Trigger grieving/animation sequence as part of conversation flow
Enter gem valuation/trade flow from conversation menus
Open gemstone shop submenu and handle purchase flow
Open clothing shop submenu and handle purchase flow
Call context-sensitive monologue helper when NPC can act and nobodyElseTalking is false
Invoke idle monologue as part of sitting behavior

external_calls.purpose: Inspect stolen item's type to determine whether it is valuable and to drive escalation behavior
Notify/trigger guards when theft escalation reaches the threshold
Read current time period to pick a U8P_RHIAN::schedule/route variant
Prepare/present U8P_RHIAN::schedule choices before suspension (likely UI or computation helper)
Commit/apply chosen U8P_RHIAN::schedule after process_result() indicates acceptance
Alert guards when NPC is attacked under a specific attacker id condition
Trigger shared animation/gesture synchronized with barks
Schedule delayed helper/effect after a monologue
Decide proximity branches for varied idle lines
Inspect an item frame to choose whether to pathfind or call monologue helper
Prepare or synchronize NPC prior to certain barks (inferred animation/synchronization)
Present yes/no prompt to the player and branch on process_result() for trade acceptance
Give reward/coin to the player on trade acceptance
Attempt to complete sale by equipping/gifting the chosen item; boolean result gates success/failure responses
Verify presence of payment or to locate items involved in the transaction after equip attempt
Start conversation UI loop without changing the map/camera for certain entry conditions

reads.name: rhianSchedule
reads.likely_effect: Used to select fast-area behaviors and to gate theft-reaction behavior and conversation options

reads.name: toranDead
reads.likely_effect: Switches initial greeting/conversation entry paths when true

reads.name: rhianMet
reads.likely_effect: Selects first-encounter vs repeat greetings and influences some bark variants

reads.name: rhianKneeling
reads.likely_effect: Read to decide kneeling-specific reactions and monologues on area entry

reads.name: rhianSitting
reads.likely_effect: Read to decide sitting-specific behavior (sitting vs kneeling flows)

reads.name: rhiangrieving
reads.likely_effect: Read to select grieving monologue variants when U8P_RHIAN::schedule==0x01

reads.name: guardsCalled
reads.likely_effect: Checked to avoid re-alerting guards after they've been called

reads.name: somebodyTalking
reads.likely_effect: Read to decide whether to run spoken monologue helpers or keep quiet

writes.name: rhianMet
writes.likely_effect: Set true on first meeting to mark that player has met Rhian

writes.name: rhianKneeling
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 by monologue helpers to mark kneeling pose/state

writes.name: rhianSitting
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 by U8P_RHIAN::func0804 to mark sitting state and cleared by U8P_RHIAN::func0EC5; used to gate behavior

writes.name: rhiangrieving
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 by U8P_RHIAN::func0794 to mark grieving state

writes.name: rhianSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Written by U8P_RHIAN::schedule() when process_result() is true to commit chosen U8P_RHIAN::schedule

writes.name: rhianMoveCheck
writes.likely_effect: Incremented/written by U8P_RHIAN::AvatarStoleSomething to track warning/escalation state for theft reactions

writes.name: stolenOnce
writes.likely_effect: Set when a particular valuable item is stolen to prevent repeating the strongest reaction

writes.name: somebodyTalking
writes.likely_effect: Cleared (set to 0) at the end of reaction flows (U8P_RHIAN::func4E14) to reset talk state

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_RHIAN implements the NPC Rhian: short U8P_RHIAN::look descriptions, a full conversation/shop handler, time-of-day U8P_RHIAN::schedule selection, fast-area (proximity) reactions, grief/idle monologues, and theft/attack reactions that can escalate to calling guards.
